title: Link-11 (UHF)
short description: This is the UHF band variant of Link-11, which is transmitted on a FM carrier. The FM-demodulated baseband is identical to the HF Link-11 waveform.
description: This is the UHF band variant of **Link-11**, which is transmitted on a FM carrier. The FM-demodulated baseband is identical to the original [Link-11](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/Link-11) waveform used on MF and HF bands. See the [Link-11](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/Link-11) page for in-depth details on the underlying waveform characteristics.
